```{r Total number of female visits}

Group_period_sum <- read.csv("Resident cooperation MS Kupan Data/Group_period_sums.csv")

## Model1 - intercept only

# Gaussian
combo_visit_nr_lm_m2 <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_nr_all_females ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum)
summary(combo_visit_nr_lm_m2)


# Neg bin
combo_visit_nr_nb_m2 <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_nr_all_females ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = nbinom2, zi = ~  0)
summary(combo_visit_nr_nb_m2)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_visit_nr_nb_m2)
check_overdispersion(combo_visit_nr_nb_m2)
check_singularity(combo_visit_nr_nb_m2)
# Ok

# Poisson
combo_visit_nr_poi_m2 <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_nr_all_females ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = poisson(link = log), zi = ~  0)
summary(combo_visit_nr_poi_m2)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_visit_nr_poi_m2)
check_overdispersion(combo_visit_nr_poi_m2)
check_singularity(combo_visit_nr_poi_m2)
# Zero-inflated, over dispersed


# Zero_inflated neg bin
combo_visit_nr_zi_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_nr_all_females ~  Total_nr_display + Condition + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = nbinom2, zi = ~  1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_visit_nr_zi_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_visit_nr_zi_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_visit_nr_zi_mm)
check_singularity(combo_visit_nr_zi_mm)
confint(combo_visit_nr_zi_mm, level = 0.95, method = "profile")
# Ok - final model

anova(combo_visit_nr_nb_m2, combo_visit_nr_zi_mm)


## Model inspection

# Simulate residuals
sim_res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = combo_visit_nr_zi_mm)

# Plot residuals
plot(sim_res)
# Ok 

testDispersion(sim_res)
# Ok



## Model 2: intercept/slope models (with condition as slope)

# Gaussian
combo_visit_nr_sl_lm_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_nr_all_females ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum)
summary(combo_visit_nr_sl_lm_mm)


# Neg bin
combo_visit_nr_sl_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_nr_all_females ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = nbinom2, zi = ~  0)
summary(combo_visit_nr_sl_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_visit_nr_sl_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_visit_nr_sl_mm)
check_singularity(combo_visit_nr_sl_mm)
# Ok

# Poisson
combo_visit_nr_poi_sl_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_nr_all_females ~ Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum, family = poisson(link = log))
summary(combo_visit_nr_poi_sl_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_visit_nr_poi_sl_mm, tolerance = 0.05)
check_overdispersion(combo_visit_nr_poi_sl_mm)
check_singularity(combo_visit_nr_poi_sl_mm)
# Zero inflated


# Zi Poisson
combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_nr_all_females ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = poisson(link = log), zi = ~  1 )
summary(combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm)
check_singularity(combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm)
confint(combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm, level = 0.95)
# Ok final model

# Zi neg bin
combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_nb_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_nr_all_females ~  Condition + Week + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = nbinom2, zi = ~  1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_nb_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_nb_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_nb_mm)
check_singularity(combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_nb_mm)
# Not converging


## Model inspection

# Simulate residuals
sim_res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = combo_visit_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm)

# Plot residuals
plot(sim_res)
# Ok 

testDispersion(sim_res)
# Ok


```


# III/3b. Total duration of female visits


```{r Total duration of female visits}

Group_period_sum <- read.csv("Resident cooperation MS Kupan Data/Group_period_sums.csv")


## Distribution test

# Gamma distribution on the non-zero values

hist(Group_period_sum$Total_visit_duration_all_females)

Group_period_sum2 <- Group_period_sum %>% filter(Total_visit_duration_all_females != 0)

hist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females)

library(fitdistrplus)
descdist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females, discrete = FALSE, boot = 1000)
plotdist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females, histo = TRUE, demp = TRUE)

norm <- fitdist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females, "norm")
plot(norm)

lognormal <- fitdist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females, "lnorm")
plot(lognormal)

gamma <- fitdist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females, "gamma")
plot(gamma)

plot.legend <- c("norm", "lognormal", "gamma")
denscomp(list(norm, lognormal, gamma), legendtext = plot.legend)
qqcomp(list(norm, lognormal, gamma), legendtext = plot.legend)
cdfcomp(list(norm, lognormal, gamma), legendtext = plot.legend)
ppcomp(list(norm, lognormal, gamma), legendtext = plot.legend)

gofstat(list(norm, lognormal_dist, gamma), fitnames = c("normal", "log-Normal", "Gamma"))

# Log transform
Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr <- log(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females)

hist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr)


# Square-root transform
Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr <- sqrt(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females)

hist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr)

descdist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr, discrete = FALSE, boot = 1000)
plotdist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr, histo = TRUE, demp = TRUE)

norm <- fitdist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr, "norm")
plot(norm)

lognormal <- fitdist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr, "lnorm")
plot(lognormal)

gamma <- fitdist(Group_period_sum2$Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr, "gamma")
plot(gamma)

plot.legend <- c("norm", "lognormal", "gamma")
denscomp(list(norm, lognormal, gamma), legendtext = plot.legend)
qqcomp(list(norm, lognormal, gamma), legendtext = plot.legend)
cdfcomp(list(norm, lognormal, gamma), legendtext = plot.legend)
ppcomp(list(norm, lognormal, gamma), legendtext = plot.legend)

gofstat(list(norm, lognormal, gamma), fitnames = c("normal", "log-Normal", "Gamma"))
# Gamma is the best on the sqrt transformad data



## Model1 - intercept only

Group_period_sum$Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr <- ifelse(Group_period_sum$Total_visit_duration_all_females == 0, 0, sqrt(Group_period_sum$Total_visit_duration_all_females))


# Gamma hurdle gamma model
combo_visit_dur_gamma_hurdle_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr ~ Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum, family = ziGamma(link="log"), ziformula = ~ 1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_visit_dur_gamma_hurdle_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_visit_dur_gamma_hurdle_mm)
confint(combo_visit_dur_gamma_hurdle_mm, level = 0.95, method = "profile")
# Ok

# Lognorm hurdle model
combo_visit_dur_lognorm_hurdle_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_duration_all_females_tr ~ Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum, family = glmmTMB::lognormal(link="log"), ziformula = ~ 1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_visit_dur_lognorm_hurdle_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_visit_dur_lognorm_hurdle_mm)
# Final model

anova(combo_visit_dur_gamma_hurdle_mm, combo_visit_dur_lognorm_hurdle_mm)


## Model inspection

# Simulate residuals
sim_res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = combo_visit_dur_lognorm_hurdle_mm)

# Plot residuals
plot(sim_res)
# Ok 

testDispersion(sim_res)
# Ok


## Model 2: intercept/slope models (with condition as slope)

# Transformed data does not converge
combo_visit_dur_gamma_hurdle_sl_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_duration_all_females ~ Condition + Week + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum, family = ziGamma(link="log"), ziformula = ~ 1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_visit_dur_gamma_hurdle_sl_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_visit_dur_gamma_hurdle_sl_mm)
confint(combo_visit_dur_gamma_hurdle_sl_mm, level = 0.95, method = "profile")
# Ok - final model

combo_visit_dur_lognorm_hurdle_sl_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_visit_duration_all_females ~ Condition + Week + Total_nr_display + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum, family = glmmTMB::lognormal(link="log"), ziformula = ~ 1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_visit_dur_lognorm_hurdle_sl_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_visit_dur_lognorm_hurdle_sl_mm)
# Slope doesn't converge


## Model inspection

# Simulate residuals
sim_res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = combo_visit_dur_gamma_hurdle_sl_mm)

# Plot residuals
plot(sim_res)
# Ok 

testDispersion(sim_res)
# Ok

```


# III/3c. Number of copulation attempts


```{r Copulation attempts}


Group_period_sum <- read.csv("Resident cooperation MS Kupan Data/Group_period_sums.csv")


## Model1: intercept only models

# Gaussian
combo_cop_nr_lm_mm <- glmmTMB(Copulation_nr ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum)
summary(combo_cop_nr_lm_mm)


# Neg bin
combo_cop_nr_mm <- glmmTMB(Copulation_nr ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = nbinom2, zi = ~  0)
summary(combo_cop_nr_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_cop_nr_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_cop_nr_mm)
check_singularity(combo_cop_nr_mm)
# Ok


# Poisson model
combo_cop_nr_poi_mm <- glmer(Copulation_nr ~ Condition  + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week/Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum, family = poisson(link = log))
summary(combo_cop_nr_poi_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_cop_nr_poi_mm, tolerance = 0.05)
check_overdispersion(combo_cop_nr_poi_mm)
# Zero inflated


# Neg bin zi
combo_cop_nr__nb_zi_mm <- glmmTMB(Copulation_nr ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = nbinom2, zi = ~  1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_cop_nr__nb_zi_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_cop_nr__nb_zi_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_cop_nr__nb_zi_mm)
check_singularity(combo_cop_nr__nb_zi_mm)
confint(combo_cop_nr__nb_zi_mm, level = 0.95, method = "profile")
# Ok, Final model!


# Poisson zi
combo_cop_nr_poi_zi_mm <- glmmTMB(Copulation_nr ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = poisson(link = log), zi = ~  1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_cop_nr_poi_zi_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_cop_nr_poi_zi_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_cop_nr_poi_zi_mm)
check_singularity(combo_cop_nr_poi_zi_mm)
# Ok

anova(combo_cop_nr_mm, combo_cop_nr__nb_zi_mm, combo_cop_nr_poi_zi_mm)


# Model comparison
cand.set <- list(combo_cop_nr_lm_mm, combo_cop_nr_mm, combo_cop_nr__nb_zi_mm, combo_cop_nr_poi_zi_mm)
names <- c("m_lm", "m_nb", "m_nb_zi", "m_p_zi")
aictab(cand.set, modnames=names, second.ord=TRUE, nobs=NULL, sort=TRUE)


## Model inspection

# Simulate residuals
sim_res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = combo_cop_nr__nb_zi_mm)

# Plot residuals
plot(sim_res)
# Ok 

testDispersion(sim_res)
# Ok



## Model 2: intercept/slope models (with condition as slope)

# Gaussian
combo_cop_nr_sl_lm_mm <- glmmTMB(Copulation_nr ~ Condition + Total_nr_display + Week  +(Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum)
summary(combo_cop_nr_sl_lm_mm)
# Convergence


# Neg bin
combo_cop_nr_sl_mm <- glmmTMB(Copulation_nr ~ Condition + Total_nr_display + Week  +(Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum, family = nbinom2)
summary(combo_cop_nr_sl_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_cop_nr_sl_mm, tolerance = 0.05)
check_overdispersion(combo_cop_nr_sl_mm)
check_singularity(combo_cop_nr_sl_mm)
# No Zero inflated BUT Warning: iteration limit reached

# zi neg bin
combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_nb_mm <- glmmTMB(Copulation_nr ~  Condition + Week + Total_nr_display + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = nbinom2, zi = ~  1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_nb_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_nb_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_nb_mm)
check_singularity(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_nb_mm)
# Ok but the random structure


# Poisson
combo_cop_nr_sl_mm <- glmmTMB(Copulation_nr ~ Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum, family = poisson(link = log))
summary(combo_cop_nr_sl_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_cop_nr_sl_mm, tolerance = 0.05)
check_overdispersion(combo_cop_nr_sl_mm)
check_singularity(combo_cop_nr_sl_mm)
confint(combo_cop_nr_sl_mm, level = 0.95, method = "profile")
# Ok - final model

# Zi poisson
combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm <- glmmTMB(Copulation_nr ~  Condition + Total_nr_display  + Week + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = poisson(link = log), zi = ~  1 + Total_nr_display )
summary(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm)
check_singularity(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm)
# Convergence

combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm2 <- glmmTMB(Copulation_nr ~  Condition + Week + Total_nr_display + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = poisson(link = log), zi = ~  1 )
summary(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm2)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm2)
check_overdispersion(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm2)
check_singularity(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm2)
# Ok

anova(combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_nb_mm, combo_cop_nr_sl_mm,  combo_cop_nr_zi_sl_poi_mm2)


## Model inspection

# Simulate residuals
sim_res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = combo_cop_nr_sl_mm)

# Plot residuals
plot(sim_res)
# Ok 

testDispersion(sim_res)
# Ok


```


# III/3d. Number of successful copulations


```{r Successful copulations}


Group_period_sum <- read.csv("Resident cooperation MS Kupan Data/Group_period_sums.csv")


## Model1: intercept only models

# Gaussian
combo_suc_cop_nr_lm_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_successful_copulations ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum)
summary(combo_suc_cop_nr_lm_mm)
# Ok

# Neg bin
combo_suc_cop_nr_nb_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_successful_copulations ~  Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = nbinom2, zi = ~  0)
summary(combo_suc_cop_nr_nb_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_suc_cop_nr_nb_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_suc_cop_nr_nb_mm)
check_singularity(combo_suc_cop_nr_nb_mm)
# Ok

# Poisson
combo_suc_cop_nr_poi_mm <- glmer(Total_successful_copulations ~ Condition  +  Total_nr_display + Week + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum, family = poisson(link = log))
summary(combo_suc_cop_nr_poi_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_suc_cop_nr_poi_mm, tolerance = 0.05)
check_overdispersion(combo_suc_cop_nr_poi_mm)
check_singularity(combo_suc_cop_nr_poi_mm)
# Zero inflated


# Neg bin zero inflated
combo_suc_cop_nr_zi_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_successful_copulations ~  Condition   + Week +  Total_nr_display + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = nbinom2, zi = ~  1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_suc_cop_nr_zi_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_suc_cop_nr_zi_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_suc_cop_nr_zi_mm)
check_singularity(combo_suc_cop_nr_zi_mm)
# Ok

# Zi Poisson
combo_suc_cop_poi_zi_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_successful_copulations ~  Condition   + Week +  Total_nr_display + (1|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = poisson(link = log), zi = ~  1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_suc_cop_poi_zi_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_suc_cop_poi_zi_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_suc_cop_poi_zi_mm)
check_singularity(combo_suc_cop_poi_zi_mm)
confint(combo_suc_cop_nr_zi_mm, level = 0.95, method = "profile")
# OK - final model

anova(combo_suc_cop_nr_nb_mm, combo_suc_cop_nr_zi_mm, combo_suc_cop_poi_zi_mm)


# Model comparison
cand.set <- list(combo_suc_cop_nr_nb_mm, combo_suc_cop_nr_zi_mm, combo_suc_cop_poi_zi_mm )
names <- c("m_nb", "m_zi_nb", "m_zi_poi")
aictab(cand.set, modnames=names, second.ord=TRUE, nobs=NULL, sort=TRUE)


## Model inspection

# Simulate residuals
sim_res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = combo_suc_cop_poi_zi_mm)

# Plot residuals
plot(sim_res)
# Ok 

testDispersion(sim_res)
# Ok


## Model 2: intercept/slope models (with condition as slope)

# Gaussian
combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_lm_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_successful_copulations ~ Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum)
summary(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_lm_mm)
# Ok

# Neg bin
combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_successful_copulations ~ Condition + Total_nr_display + Week + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum, family = nbinom2)
summary(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_mm, tolerance = 0.05)
check_overdispersion(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_mm)
check_singularity(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_mm)
# Ok

# Poisson
combo_cop_nr_poi_sl_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_successful_copulations ~ Condition  + Total_nr_display + Week + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum, family = poisson(link = log))
summary(combo_cop_nr_poi_sl_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_cop_nr_poi_sl_mm, tolerance = 0.05)
check_overdispersion(combo_cop_nr_poi_sl_mm)
check_singularity(combo_cop_nr_poi_sl_mm)
# Ok

# Zi neg bin
combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_successful_copulations ~  Condition + Week + Total_nr_display + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = nbinom2, zi = ~  1 + Total_nr_display)
summary(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm)
check_singularity(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm)
# Convergence

# Zi neg bin
combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm2 <- glmmTMB(Total_successful_copulations ~  Condition + Week + Total_nr_display + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = nbinom2, zi = ~  1)
summary(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm2)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm2)
check_overdispersion(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm2)
check_singularity(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm2)
# Ok

# Zi Poisson
combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_poi_mm <- glmmTMB(Total_successful_copulations ~  Condition  + Week + Total_nr_display + (Condition|Combo_lek_week:Colour_code), data = Group_period_sum,  family = poisson(link = log), zi = ~  1 )
summary(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_poi_mm)
performance::check_zeroinflation(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_poi_mm)
check_overdispersion(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_poi_mm)
check_singularity(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_poi_mm)
confint(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_poi_mm, level = 0.95) # with method = profile it's not converging
# Ok, convergence problem with Total_nr_display in zi part, final model

anova(combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_mm, combo_cop_nr_poi_sl_mm, combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm2, combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_poi_mm)

# Model comparison
cand.set <- list(combo_cop_nr_poi_sl_mm, combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_nb_mm, combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_poi_mm)
names <- c("m_poi", "m_zi_nb", "m_zi_poi")
aictab(cand.set, modnames=names, second.ord=TRUE, nobs=NULL, sort=TRUE)

## Model inspection

# Simulate residuals
sim_res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = combo_suc_cop_nr_sl_zi_poi_mm)

# Plot residuals
plot(sim_res)
# Ok 

testDispersion(sim_res)
# Ok


```
